title: Joon-ik Lee to Direct Short-Form Live-Action Series Adaptation of Father's Home Meal Webtoon
content: Lezhin announced on Tuesday a short-form live-action adaptation of the webtoon Father's Home Meal has completed filming and entered post-production, with a release planned for the second half of 2026 on Lezhin Snack.
author: ANN

title: My Hero Academia Creator Reveals Alternate Scenes For The Series
content: The end has come and gone for My Hero Academia , though the shonen franchise still has some gas in the tank before we bid a final farewell to UA Academy. Following the conclusion of My Hero Academia: Vigilantes , the main anime series will release an epilogue episode next month titled “More.” Recently, thanks to the…
author: ComicBook

title: Mamamoo's Solar Releases Song for Webtoon-Based Live-Action Film Everyday We Are
content: Solar of Korean girl group Mamamoo has released “My Wish,” an original soundtrack song for the film Everyday We Are . "My Wish" is a ballad track centered on themes of longing and unfulfilled love, featuring Solar's vocal performance. Solar is a singer and actress best known as a member of the K-pop group Mamamoo.
author: ANN

title: 3rd Mononoke Film's 2nd Trailer Reveals Aina The End's Theme Song, More Cast
content: Twin Engine revealed the second trailer on Thursday for Gekijōban Mononoke Dai-San-Shō: Hebigami ( Mononoke the Movie: Chapter 3: Snake God ), the third installment of the Mononoke franchise's film trilogy .
author: ANN

title: One Piece’s Big Anime Return Is a Huge Disappointment
content: The One Piece anime, which has been running for more than 26 years, has long released new episodes weekly on Sundays, with only occasional breaks. However, last year marked a major shift when it was announced that the anime would adopt a seasonal format starting this year.
author: ComicBook

title: 'Mononoke Movie 3: Hebigami' Unveils Additional Cast, Theme Song, Second Trailer
content: The official website of the Mononoke anime movie project unveiled a pair of additional cast, key visual (pictured), the theme song, and second trailer for the third movie, subtitled Hebigami ( Snake God ), on Thursday. The movie is scheduled to premiere in Japanese theatres on May 29.
author: MyAnimeList

title: Eden of the East Anime Gets Stage Play
content: The Eden of the East anime is inspiring a stage play adaptation that will run in Tokyo in April-May 2027. Crunchyroll is streaming the anime, and it is also streaming the English dub . Crunchyroll describes the story: Akira Takizawa wakes up naked outside the White House with no memories.
author: ANN

title: 2026 Doraemon Film Stays at #1, The Ogre's Bride Live-Action Film Drops to #4 in Japan
content: The 2026 Doraemon film , Eiga Doraemon: Shin Nobita no Kaitei Kiganjō ( Doraemon the Movie: New Nobita and the Castle of the Undersea Devil ), stayed at #1 in its sixth weekend at the Japanese box office last weekend.
author: ANN

title: Hiro Mashima Presents New Fairy Tail Manga Miniseries for 20th Anniversary
content: The official X (formerly Twitter ) account for Hiro Mashima announced on Tuesday that his Fairy Tail manga will receive a new manga miniseries in Kodansha 's Weekly Shōnen Magazine to celebrate the series' 20th anniversary. The manga will begin in the combined 36th and 37th issue on August 5.
author: ANN
